title: Light Rod Mod
description: Craft and launch devastating Light Rod projectiles!
body:
## Light Rod Mod v2 - singleplayer, multiplayer, and PvP

This mod lets you **craft and launch devastating 'Light Rod' projectiles**, photon missiles based on the end rod. It works in **singleplayer, multiplayer, and PvP**, in all vanilla dimensions.    
   
![Shows a player hitting a hidden creeper with a Light Rod projectile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c554c14064e855fb6936edb443897575b9878efe.gif)   
_Lighting up a hidden creeper_.   

## About Light Rods

Light Rods are powerful hand-launched horizontal projectiles.    
Hold them in the mainhand and sneak to launch.   
    
**PvP notes**   
Hits deal 50 damage.   
Light Rods will not hit players at very close range (~3 blocks).    
Players can only have one launched Light Rod each in flight at a time.     
   
**For the best visual experience**   
Use Light Rod Mod alongside your favorite dynamic lighting mod.   
    
**Here's the recipe**. Only the layout and orientation shown here will work.   
   
![Shows the shaped recipe layout for Light Rods.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c5534429050abbd0321cae4d620a40d4a33a112.gif)   
   
**Not feeling crafty?** Here's the chat bar command to give yourself 64 lethal Light Rods:     
/give @s stick[custom_name={"text":"Light Rod"}] 64

## Known issues

**Shooting Light Rods while flying in Creative mode is currently potentially lethal**.  
    
If you fly around for long enough in Creative mode shooting at everything, you'll eventually fly into your own projectile and die. I'll fix this very soon - in the meantime use strong Resistance, Invulnerability, or armor when flying and shooting!
